rationale: The cited paper is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core topic and modeling approach: both focus on word-of-mouth programs using agent-based/social-network diffusion simulations, and both analyze targeting/seeding policy effects. The citing paper’s stated gap (“turning prior ABM and WOM diffusion ideas into an operational DSS”) makes this 2013 JMR seeding-value paper a plausible foundational/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention. With only DOI-level match evidence and no contrary context, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
